markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and Neurl for technical content review and creation.](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX needs technical experts to review and improve AI-generated content, particularly for web development and DevOps topics](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Neurl offers a network of engineer-creators with expertise in cloud, data, AI, and web technologies](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Initial collaboration will focus on content review at $20-30/hour, with potential for more involved content creation](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Both parties aim to develop an efficient workflow that leverages AI and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Combines writers, AI workflows, and iterative improvements](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Focuses on content marketing and SEO for clients](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Current challenge: ensuring technical accuracy in content about specialized topics](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Writers often lack technical background to verify content quality](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### Proposed Collaboration Model

  - [Neurl experts to review content near completion stage](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Involvement at outline/brief stage and final review](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Experts to provide feedback, suggestions, and corrections](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Potential for more extensive involvement if initial tests are successful](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Neurl's Expertise and Structure

  - [Core competencies: cloud, data, AI, and web technologies](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Network of engineer-creators who understand technical storytelling](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Experts typically work on projects part-time, alongside full-time engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Global talent pool including US, Canada, Nigeria, Botswana, and Ghana](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

### Content Types and Clients

  - [Mix of top and bottom funnel content, primarily blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Clients include Webflow (web development) and Gitpod (DevOps)](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Content often includes code snippets and technical concepts](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Workflow and Pricing

  - [Initial rate proposed at $20-30 per hour for review work](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Communication via Slack for async collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Invoicing based on hours worked, approved by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Future Improvements

  - [Potential development of AI-assisted fact-checking and code verification tools](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Goal to create a system that gives experts more leverage and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to send brief on customers and content types for initial collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Stephen to identify and invite suitable experts to the GrowthX Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Start with DevOps (Gitpod) and web development (Strapi.io) content](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Test the collaboration model and assess efficiency/effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Explore potential for developing AI-assisted tools to enhance the review process](https://fathom.video/share/2S4RVdPdUDiAU8rdLYxse6dsA2KbbEUs?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
